title: rubus harmandii
intro: Rubus harmandii, also known as Harmand's raspberry or Chinese raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rubus harmandii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Rubus harmandii is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
